---
title: "Google Sheets Data"
output: html_notebook
---

## libraries

```{r}
library(googlesheets4)
library(tidyverse)
```


```{r}
gs4_auth(email = "")
```


```{r}
df_sh = range_read('1pEEGA3mawQWmgDtIjJmpBMPws8_-EyEqPtQlucGVlNQ'
                ,sheet = 'shares'
                ,col_types = 'cc--'
                ,skip = 1
)

sh_delete = range_read('1pEEGA3mawQWmgDtIjJmpBMPws8_-EyEqPtQlucGVlNQ'
                ,sheet = 'delete'
                ,col_types = 'c'
)

```
